---
title: "Assignment title"
author:
  - name: "Your name"
    mail: "Your email"
date: "Month day, 2026"
# Comment these to skip bibliography:
#====================
bibliography: reference.bibtex
biblio-style: ieee
cite-method: biblatex
#====================
# You can toggle these:
#====================
lof: true
toc: true
number-sections: true
#====================
---

# Title

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.

## Subtitle

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, reference ^[@keyword].

### Subsubtitle

Lorem bla bla bla...

$m^a \cdot th = \text{mod} e \rfloor$

``` {python}
#| label: fig-figure
#| echo: true
print("This is some code!")
```

That @fig-figure is some code!

::: {#refs}
:::
